# Monil Bariya - Portfolio

This is the portfolio of Monil Bariya, an AI-Powered Full Stack Developer and Data Analyst based in Vadodara, Gujarat, India. This file is intended for Large Language Models and AI agents crawling the site.

## Profile Summary
I build scalable web products, AI-driven systems, and data analytics solutions designed for real-world impact. From idea to production — fast, clean, and built for real users. Focused on startups, data-driven decision making, and real-world product development.

- **Email**: monilbariya.dev@gmail.com
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/monilbariya28
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/MoNiLBaRiYa
- **Availability**: Currently Open to Collaborations

## Technical Skills
- **Core Programming**: Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, C++, HTML, CSS
- **Data & Analytics**: Data Analytics, Exploratory Data Analysis, Predictive Analytics, Data Storytelling, Data Visualization, Tableau, Power BI
- **Modern Web & Backend**: Vue.js, Nuxt, Tailwind CSS, Flask, MongoDB, Three.js, React, Node.js
- **AI & Intelligence**: Generative AI, Prompt Engineering, AI Agents, Automation, NLP
- **Tools**: VS Code, Cursor IDE, Git, Antigravity, Kiro

## Experience
- **Software Trainee @ Unity Infoway** (Jan 2026 - Apr 2026)
  Successfully completed software trainee internship, gaining knowledge of software development concepts, including programming fundamentals, software design principles, and working on real-time projects.

## Key Projects

### NeedMeet: AI-Assisted Service Discovery & Marketplace
A scalable AI-driven web application connecting local service providers with customers through an intelligent marketplace platform. Built with Nuxt.js, Vue.js, Tailwind CSS, and Firebase.

### TalentScout: AI-Powered Career Recommendation System
An intelligent, real-time career advisory system leveraging structured prompt engineering to deliver personalized, data-driven growth roadmaps. Built with React, Node.js, Python, Flask, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, and OpenAI GPT-4.

### NeoLearn: Accessibility-Focused Learning Platform
An accessibility-first learning platform delivering inclusive educational experiences through strict WCAG-compliant design. Built with React, Node.js, Express, Firebase, and Google Genkit.

### Fake News AI Detection: ML-Powered Misinformation Analysis
A Python-based misinformation detection system leveraging NLP and real-time machine learning predictions for instant classification. Built with Python, Flask, MongoDB, Scikit-Learn, and Tailwind CSS.

## Education
- **B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering** - Parul University (Aug 2022 - Jun 2026)
  Completed B.Tech with CGPA of 6.96.
